name: Mambu Banking-as-a-Service API
what_it_does: Mambu Cloud Banking REST API for composable banking-as-a-service platform. Enables AI agents to manage loan origination and servicing lifecycle automation, handle deposit account creation and transaction management, access credit product configuration and eligibility management, retrieve loan repayment schedule and amortization data, manage customer and account portfolio management, handle interest and fee calculation and accrual management, access disbursement and repayment transaction processing, retrieve portfolio analytics and loan performance data, manage accounting and GL transaction generation, and integrate Mambu core banking with fintech apps, payment processors, and compliance systems.
use_cases: Automating loan origination workflows from digital lending agents
Managing deposit account lifecycle from neobank platform agents
Processing loan repayments from collections automation agents
Integrating core banking data with analytics from fintech agents
not_for: Traditional bank without cloud-native core banking migration appetite
Consumer banking apps without banking license or BaaS provider
Simple payment processing without core banking product requirements
best_when: A fintech, neobank, or BaaS provider using Mambu wants AI agents to automate loan lifecycle management, deposit operations, repayment processing, portfolio analytics, and regulatory reporting integration.
avoid_when: FINANCIAL+REGULATORY RISK: Core banking automation requires banking license compliance — automated loan approval, account opening, and transaction processing must comply with applicable banking regulations. KYC/AML automation must satisfy local regulator requirements. Automated credit decisions require Fair Lending compliance review.

auth.notes: Mambu uses API key and Basic auth for v1, OAuth 2.0 for v2 APIs. Role-based access control with data-level permission scoping. REST API v2 with OpenAPI specification. Webhooks for loan and account event notifications. Mambu Marketplace for partner integrations. SDK not officially maintained — community SDKs available.

pricing.free_tier_limits: Sandbox environment free for development; production requires enterprise contract
pricing.paid_tiers: Annual subscription; per-account or transaction-volume pricing
pricing.notes: Berlin, Germany. Founded 2011. Private ($900M+ funding, $5B+ valuation). Cloud-native core banking market pioneer. 250+ live customers across 65 countries. 50M+ end customers on Mambu. Composable banking architecture. Strong neobank, BNPL, and digital lending verticals. Competes with Thought Machine and Temenos for cloud core banking.

performance.rate_limits: Rate limits per API key; documented in API reference; bulk operations via batch endpoints

known_agent_gotchas: FINANCIAL+REGULATORY RISK: Automated credit decisions require Fair Lending compliance — ensure automated approval/denial logic is fair and auditable
v1 vs v2 API — Mambu has older v1 (Basic auth) and newer v2 (OAuth2 + OpenAPI); use v2 for new integrations
Banking license requirements — using Mambu requires either banking license or BaaS provider arrangement; automation must operate within licensed scope
Webhook reliability — implement webhook signature verification and idempotency for financial events; re-delivery on failure
Sandbox environment — sandbox data is separate from production; test all automation thoroughly in sandbox before production deployment
Accounting entries — Mambu auto-generates GL entries for transactions; automation must account for double-entry bookkeeping side effects
agent_readiness.security_notes: Core banking. SOC2, ISO27001, GDPR, PSD2. API key/OAuth2. Multi-region. Core banking transaction and account data.

security_score_components.security_notes: Core banking. SOC2, ISO27001, GDPR, PSD2. API key/OAuth2. Multi-region. Banking transaction data.
